title: Kadhal Ennulle Lyrics Neram Songs Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Kadhal Ennulle
Singer: Ranjith Govind
Movie: Neram
Music: Rajesh Murugesan		 .

Lyrics in Thanglish
Exact translation of tamil words
Kadhal Ennulle
vandha neram ariyaamal
naatkal ippadi odudhey vazhvil
Naanum unnudan nadakira neram
innaalil,saalai athanai
azhagaai maarum

En veetai thidal aaki vizhayadum
paravai pol, manadhulle
vandhaaduvadhu yaaro

En swaasa araiyaagi
ennai thaangum udalaagi
uyirvazha kootiselvahu yaaro

Kadhal Ennulle
vandha neram ariyaamal
naatkal ippadi odudhey vazhvil
Naanum unnudan nadakira neram
innaalil,saalai athanai
azhagaai maarum

Arthamilla veenaana vaarthaigalai
naan pesum velayilum rasipaai

Azhavilla kadhalayum
endha sulalilum
naan ketkum munney tharuvaai

Unmuga dhasaigalil engae vetkam
ulladhendru nee pesum neramellam
naanum thaedi paarpen

Kulia kaaichal yedhum vandhaal
unnule naanum vandhaal
medhuvaai sriyaai adhu pogaadha

Vazhviniley,un moochu thoorathile
unnodu illai endraal thavippen
vazhum naatkalilum
aayul muludhilum
un vaasathiley pilaipen

En balam balaveenam ellam therinjaalum
un anbu vandha pinbu
en naanam maaripogum
en gunam gunaveenam unnodu serndhuvittal
nalamaai nalamaai adhu maaraadhaa!!

Kadhal ennulle ...

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Kadhal Ennulle?

The song captures the essence of love and longing, with a soothing melody that evokes deep emotions.

Who composed the music for Neram?

The music for Neram was composed by Rajesh Murugesan.

Who is the singer of Kadhal Ennulle?

The song is sung by Ranjith Govind.

What is the release year of the movie Neram?

The movie Neram was released in 2013.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the movie Neram, Kadhal Ennulle is a romantic melody that beautifully portrays the emotions of love and longing. The song's soothing tune and heartfelt lyrics create a serene atmosphere, making it perfect for moments of reflection and romance. Ranjith Govind's soulful rendition, combined with Rajesh Murugesan's captivating music, evokes a sense of nostalgia and deep emotional connection. This track is a testament to the timeless nature of love and the beauty of musical expression.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the enchanting melody of Kadhal Ennulle from the movie Neram, where Ranjith Govind's soulful voice meets Rajesh Murugesan's captivating music. This romantic track beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. Dive into a world of emotions with this soothing and heartfelt song.
stanzaMeanings: The moment love came into me, without realizing, days are passing by like this in life. When I walk with you today, the road becomes so beautiful.
Like a bird that makes a nest out of my house, someone is entering my heart.
Someone who becomes my breath, supports me as my body, and leads me to live.
The moment love came into me, without realizing, days are passing by like this in life. When I walk with you today, the road becomes so beautiful.
Even when I speak meaningless words, you enjoy them.
Even before I ask for love without tears, you give it to me.
When you talk about where my shyness is in your expressions, I will search and see.
If any fever comes, when I come to you, it will gently go away.
The moment love came into me...
In life, if I am not with you at the distance of your breath, I will suffer. In the days I live and throughout my life, I will live in your presence.
Even if I know my strength and weakness, after your love came, my shame changes. My character and weakness, when joined with you, will it change for the better?
